case_title: THE CITY TOW VS FEATHERSTONE, CRAIG

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEATHERSTONE, CRAIG $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $87.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,087.00, DEFENDANT TO REMOVE VEHICLE PRIOR TO JULY 31 2003. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY FEATHERSTONE, CRAIG AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FEATHERSTONE, CRAIG
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FEATHERSTONE, CRAIG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-22-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-26-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
